sglang.title: init support for KTransformers Heterogeneous Computing
sglang.author: Atream
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

KTransformers Integration to Support CPU/GPU Hybrid Inference for MoE Models
Only support CompressedTensor format. Will support other formats later.
Modifications

Hack num_gpu_experts to reduce VRAM usage and GPU calculation. Will refactor to use  experts_map instead of num_gpu_experts.

sglang.title: Simplify multi-tokenizer
sglang.author: zhengkezhou1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

fix #11172
Modification
This PR introduces http_worker_ipc field for BaseReq and http_worker_ipcs for BaseBatchReq.

Former Register request is deprecated, we can directly get ipc name from each requests.
Neither rid nor MultTokenizerWrapper carries ipc information.

sglang.title: [CI] disable glm4.1v and fix the flashinfer installation
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt: As flashinfer uses the beta version of apache-tvm-ffi==0.1.0b15, CI is broken without --prerelease=allow. The previous PR #11895 enabled pre-release for all packages, which is not expected. This PR uses a hacky way to only install flashinfer with --prerelease=allow and keep other packages the same.

sglang.title: [lint] improve ruff check
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Prev PR #11685 added python/sglang to the Ruff lint scope, but the pre-commit args were written as:
args: [--select=F401,F821, --fixable=F401]

These arguments are interpreted as --select=F401 F821 --fixable=F401, which leads to
warning: Failed to lint F821: No such file or directory (os error 2)

T

vllm.title: [Performance] Dual stream execution of "shared_experts" and "selected_experts" inside FusedMoE
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR executes the shared_experts part of the FusedMoE on a separate GPU stream, so that the execution is parallelized with the "selected_experts" part. This is possible since the outputs of both are independent and are later combined. Thanks @wenscarl for pointing this out.
